title: Exercises: QEC on Trapped Ion Systems

exercises.title: Steane Code on Ions
exercises.description: Implement Steane code operations for trapped ion systems.
tasks: Implement syndrome extraction using all-to-all CNOTs
Calculate gate count for syndrome circuit
Simulate with realistic ion gate errors
hints: Each check needs 4 CNOTs to ancilla
Compare layer count to surface code

exercises.title: QCCD Zone Planner
exercises.description: Plan zone allocation for multi-qubit QEC in QCCD.
tasks: Partition logical qubit across zones (if needed)
Plan shuttling schedule for syndrome extraction
Account for shuttling errors in budget
hints: Small codes (≤20 qubits) fit one zone

exercises.title: Coherence Budget Calculator
exercises.description: Calculate QEC requirements given ion coherence.
tasks: Input: T1, T2, gate times, circuit depth
Determine how many gates before QEC needed
Compare ion budget to superconducting budget
hints: Idle error per gate ≈ gate_time / T2
Ions: may need QEC only at algorithm end

exercises.title: Code Switching Simulator
exercises.description: Simulate code switching on trapped ions for T gate.
